notes: All 9 responses share the same systematic OCR error signature: website misread as 'registrodelapropiedad.org' (header actually prints 'www.registradores.org'), Nº Borrador 712 (is 42), Nº Entrada 916.56/91656 (is 11656), applicant surname 'Almirana/Almiñana Moropag/Moropaj' (is Almiñana Moropsa), DNI '2041185 C' (is 20041185C), address '4-19' (is n°19), and applicant email joan.samoba/samba/apora@gmail.com (is joansnobc@gmail.com). None print the registry email corralejo@registrodelapropriedad.org. No genuinely fabricated content in any response — all errors are visible-text misreads (key_misses), so hallucinations are empty throughout. The only insertions of not-present text are rep2/t0.1 ('Calle de la Oliva, 1') and rep1/t0.4 ('Bajo de la Marina' street), which are misattributions of visible address lines rather than pure inventions; classified as key_misses per the misread rule.
